headline: Google and Epic give up fighting — third-party Android app stores are coming next week
summary: Google and Epic withdrew their lawsuit settlement bid. This forces Google to allow rival app stores on Android. Third-party app stores are expected to launch next week.

headline: Nothing’s good-looking Watch 3 Pro smartwatch is just $69
summary: The CMF by Nothing Watch 3 Pro smartwatch is now just $69. This budget-friendly device features a 1.43-inch OLED display. It's currently available on Amazon in all colors.

headline: Windows 11's big patch Tuesday allows you to hold off on updates for longer
summary: Windows 11's latest Patch Tuesday adds new improvements. Users can now pause system updates indefinitely. This feature was previously rolled out to Insiders.

headline: OpenAI may announce a ChatGPT smart speaker this year
summary: OpenAI is reportedly developing a ChatGPT-powered smart speaker. The device will likely lack a screen but feature a camera and sensors. It aims to allow users to converse with ChatGPT.

headline: The Grand Tour Returns in September With Its New Trio of Hosts
summary: Prime Video announced "The Grand Tour" returns September 4. The new season will feature a fresh trio of hosts. Fans can expect the show's comeback next month.

headline: AU Deals: Save $2,400 on Gigabyte's Aorus Master 16 Gen 2 Gaming Laptop
summary: Save $2,400 on the Gigabyte Aorus Master 16 Gen 2. This high-performance gaming laptop is heavily discounted. The deal is specific to Australian consumers.

headline: The FlashForge AD5X Multi-Color Mixed Material 3D Printer Drops to $215 Shipped at AliExpress
summary: The FlashForge AD5X 3D printer is now $215 shipped. It supports multi-color and mixed material printing. This deal is available through AliExpress.

headline: The Popular Budget-Friendly Flashforge Adventurer 5M 3D Printer Drops to Just $155 Shipped
summary: The Flashforge Adventurer 5M 3D printer is on sale for $155. It's a popular, budget-friendly option for 3D printing. Achieve consistent quality prints without high cost.

headline: Midnight social media curfew proposed for older UK teens
summary: A midnight social media curfew is proposed for older UK teens. Teenagers will have the option to opt out of these restrictions. Campaigners criticize the proposed measures as insufficient.

headline: Trump threatens to bomb bridges and power plants unless Iran resumes talks
summary: Trump threatened to bomb Iranian infrastructure. The threats linked to Iran resuming negotiations. Comments came amidst ongoing US-Iran conflict.

headline: Spain into World Cup final with victory over France
summary: Spain defeated France 2-0 in the World Cup semi-final. Goals from Oyarzabal and Porro secured their win. Spain advances to the 2026 World Cup final.

headline: England's biggest match since 1966 as Three Lions close in on immortality
summary: England faces Argentina in a momentous World Cup semi-final. This match is England's biggest since their 1966 victory. The Three Lions aim for historical significance.
